creator: twschulz@cord.edu
text:
thekompany.com has made an IDE for kde2 that seems to pretty promising
and since, it's impossible to build kdevelop on kde2, I thought I would
roll a port for it so people could enjoy it, because it is somewhat tricky to
build yourself.

Fix: This port is 26K in a .shar so instead it is a uuencoded tar.gz, 
which I believe the handbook said was needed.
